name: PPP - Dashboard GS v3 - PATCHED (cron + webhook refresh)

parameters.filterByFormula: =AND(IS_AFTER({Date Created}, DATEADD(DATETIME_PARSE('{{ $('Calculate Week Dates').first().json.weekStartDate }}'), -1, 'days')), IS_BEFORE({Date Created}, DATEADD(DATETIME_PARSE('{{ $('Calculate Week Dates').first().json.weekEndDate }}'), 1, 'days')))
